  "title": "Oval Diamond Solitaire Engagement Ring",
  "description": "Classic solitaire engagement ring featuring an oval-cut diamond center stone mounted on a four-prong setting with an 18K gold band. The band features a comfort-fit interior and tapered shoulders leading to the center setting. The oval diamond measures approximately 8x6mm with proper crown and pavilion faceting geometry.",

    "18K gold band with 2.5mm width at base",
    "Tapered shoulders (2.5mm to 1.8mm)",
    "Comfort-fit interior band profile",
    "Ring size 6.5 (16.9mm interior diameter)",
    "Polished finish on all gold surfaces",
    "Gallery underneath setting for light passage"
